title: helianthus subcanescens
intro: Helianthus subcanescens, also known as the smallflowered sunflower or dwarf sunflower, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family that is native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Helianthus subcanescens include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting potential antiviral and anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of Helianthus subcanescens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
